hooks.command: file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$file" == */src/* || "$file" == */tests/* ]]; then cd /Users/sriramkk/personal/skills-sync && pnpm test --passWithNoTests 2>&1 | tail -6; fi
file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$file" == *pnpm-lock.yaml ]]; then echo 'Blocked: do not edit pnpm-lock.yaml directly' >&2; exit 2; fi
